nodes.name: Mountain saw-wing
nodes.summary: Mountain saw-wing（Psalidoprocne fuliginosa）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Mountain saw-wing。

nodes.name: Mountain saw-wing
nodes.summary: The mountain saw-wing (Psalidoprocne fuliginosa), also known as the mountain rough-winged swallow or the Cameroon Mountain rough-winged swallow is a species of bird in the family Hirundinidae. It is native to the Mount Cameroon and Bioko montane forests. While it has been reported elsewhere in Central Africa (namely, the Cameroon line of Cameroon and Nigeria), it has never been confirmed. References
